title: picris eichleri
intro: Picris eichleri, also known as Eichler's hawk's beard, is a species of plant in the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Picris eichleri typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water or making a tincture from the plant's roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
